title: The Protection of Personal Data Bill, 2019
excerpt: A bill to provide for the regulation of processing of personal data and for connected purposes.

title: The Public Interest Disclosure (Whistleblower Protection) Bill, 2022
excerpt: A bill to provide for the protection of persons who disclose information in the public interest.

title: The Cybercrimes (Amendment) Bill, 2023
excerpt: A bill to amend the Cybercrimes Act 2018 to address emerging online threats and strengthen digital security.

title: The Community Land (Amendment) Bill, 2023
excerpt: A bill to amend the Community Land Act 2016 to strengthen community land rights and governance.

title: The Anti-Money Laundering (Amendment) Bill, 2022
excerpt: A bill to amend the Proceeds of Crime and Anti-Money Laundering Act 2009.

title: The National Housing (Amendment) Bill, 2023
excerpt: A bill to amend the National Housing and Development Act to promote affordable housing.

title: The Public Finance Management (Amendment) Bill, 2023
excerpt: A bill to amend the Public Finance Management Act 2012 to strengthen fiscal responsibility.
